title: narcissus jonquilla subsp. cerrolazae
intro: Narcissus jonquilla subsp. cerrolazae is a subspecies of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, specifically a type of jonquil, native to the southwestern region of Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties, derived from its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Narcissus jonquilla subsp. cerrolazae include its ability to relieve anxiety, promote sleep, and reduce pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for stress-related issues and insomnia. The plant can be prepared in various forms, such as essential oils, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized in herbal remedies.
